# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    idx = 0
    N = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    M = int(data[idx])
    idx += 1
    
    products = []
    for _ in range(N):
        P = int(data[idx])
        idx += 1
        C = int(data[idx])
        idx += 1
        functions = set(map(int, data[idx:idx+C]))
        idx += C
        products.append((P, functions))
    
    for i in range(N):
        for j in range(N):
            if i == j:
                continue
            Pi, Fi = products[i]
            Pj, Fj = products[j]
            if Pi >= Pj and Fi.issubset(Fj):
                if Pi > Pj or not Fj.issubset(Fi):
                    print("Yes")
                    return
    print("No")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
